concepts.headline: Own the hills, skip the gridlock.
concepts.subline: The premium electric commuter built for San Francisco.
concepts.rationale: Speaks directly to SF hill struggles with high-contrast, minimalist local imagery.

concepts.headline: Conquista las pendientes con pura libertad.
concepts.subline: Tu alternativa premium al tráfico de la ciudad.
concepts.rationale: Uses culturally resonant vibrant colors and native phrasing to celebrate freedom over traffic.
